title: 毎日王冠の後に・その名は

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Incredible! Grass Wonder finishes in the lead!
Overtaking everything, she stands atop this
battle of the century!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I...
choice_data_list: Congratulations on getting first place, Grass!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Hehe. What should I say? I should have
studied more Japanese for this moment.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Though even if I had, I doubt I could find the
words to express what I'm feeling right now.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: This exhilaration is indescribable!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...I lost.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I want to thank you for this invaluable
opportunity you've granted me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm grateful to you too.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But... it's not enough.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
One opportunity isn't enough. I want to run
against you again.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And next time... I won't give up the lead. Not for
a second.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'll take those words to heart.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
UUURAAAGH! I hate this, I hate this, I HATE
THIIIIIS!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I gave every last bit! My mind, body,
EVERYTHING! And still I came up short...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You got ahead of meeeeuURAAAGH!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: El, you're hurting my ears.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And you're hurtin' my heart! So just deal with it!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Those are two distinct issues...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ANYWAY! This isn't over, got it?! Not even close.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna leave Japan, travel the world, and grow stronger! And stronger! And stronger!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Then, I'm gonna come back like a burnin' phoenix!
And that's the moment you'll finally taste defeat!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Easy now... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's good that I experienced this before headin'
off.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
When I go out there to captivate the world... I'll
need to remember how your runnin' always
captivated me.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa... Wh-what have we just seen?!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Grass Wonder...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder carves her name into Umamusume
history, ushering in a new age!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder! I have to write about this! It'll be
the best article anyone's ever read!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
My, my, look how pumped that reporter is. Hehe,
how adorbs.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Y-yes?! Sorry, were you talking to me?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... No, at least not yet. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You seem mad hung up on something. Am I on
the mark?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Um... Well...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzuka, El, and Grass... It's almost scary...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: They're all... so far ahead of me.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe, she bounced quick.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You're being self-indulgent, Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: First Grass Wonder, now Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, bite me. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm just trying to be supportive so they can all
become big and strong. Is that not normal?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: And besides... you're calling me "self-indulgent"?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: How many Umamusume do you know that aren't?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Trainer, concerning our next race goal...
choice_data_list: Do you have one in mind?
Do you have one in mind?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I do.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
There won't be a repeat of last year's
half-heartedness. This year, I must show how
much I've improved.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: So please, allow me to run in the Arima Kinen!
choice_data_list: Then we'd better prepare like never before!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: The path yet continues, but I refuse to stop!
